page_title: Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 12: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Angels are back again〜
text:
is pachinko simulation game based on the CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Angels are back again〜 machine, released on 26 June 2008 (PlayStation 2) and on 12 June 2008 (Nintendo DS) by D3 Publisher.
